notes: Single industrial case study (Runeson & Höst) of one author-led legacy-to-cloud migration; includes a quantitative performance measurement/benchmark evaluation (JMeter load tests, Welch's t-test, N=100) and builds a four-pillar HITL framework/tooling. No human-participant data—'human validation time' and rollback telemetry come from the author's own workflow, not a user study.
